But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鳥居前古墳 |所属=乙訓古墳群 |image={{画像募集中|cat=乙訓郡}} |location=京都府乙訓郡大山崎町円明寺 |type=帆立貝形古墳 |area=墳丘長51メートル |built= 4世紀末頃から5世紀初頭 |Burial Facility=竪穴式石室 |Interred Persons=不明 |burial goods=画文帯神獣鏡片・勾玉・巴形銅器 |Historic Site Designation=国の[[史跡]]「鳥居前古墳」
（「乙訓古墳群」に包含）{{Cite web|和書|author=大山崎町生涯学習課文化芸術係|url=https://www.city.kawasaki.jp/880/page/0000061976.html|title=鳥居前古墳の概要リーフレットはこちらからご覧になれます。|work=大山崎町|date=2019-06-21|accessdate=2022-02-11}} |位置={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E|region:JP-26|display=inline,title}} |地図2={{location map|Japan Kyoto|coordinates=34|coordinates=54|coordinates=42.5|lon_deg=135|lon_min=40|lon_sec=39.2|map_dot_label=鳥居前古墳|mark=帆立貝形古墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|border=none|caption=京都府内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E}}}} |Special Notes= }} {{nihongo|'''Torii-mae Kofun'''|[[:ja:鳥居前古墳|鳥居前古墳]]}} is a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (帆立貝形古墳) located in {{ill|Ōyamazaki Town|ja|大山崎町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Otokuni District, Kyoto Prefecture. It is Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Otokuni Kofun Group|ja|乙訓古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The mound was discovered in a 1967 survey and has since undergone three archaeological investigations by Kyoto Prefecture and Osaka University. == Overview == Toriimae Kofun is situated on the northern slopes of Mount Tennozan, known for the famous Battle of Yamazaki, at an elevation of 97 meters. The Kofun was identified during a distribution survey conducted by the Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education in 1967. Excavations of the rear circular section and part of the mound were conducted in 1969. Initially thought to be a [[Zenpokoenfun|keyhole-shaped tumulus]] (前方後円墳), subsequent investigations revised the Historic Site to a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. === burial and burial goods === The rear circular section contains a single {{ill|Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (竪穴式石室), oriented diagonally to the main axis of the mound. Measurements are as follows: * burial chamber: 9.0 × 4.4 meters * Stone chamber: Length 6.5 meters, width 1.2 meters (west end), 0.77 meters (east end) The chamber's upper stones and ceiling stones were already missing. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including {{ill|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|ja|天皇の杜古墳|1=Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Egayama Kofun|ja|恵解山古墳|1=Igenoyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|Terado Otsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Ōyamazaki Town History]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Toriimae Kofun]] [[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[en:Toriimae Kofun]]

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鳥居前古墳 |所属=乙訓古墳群 |image={{画像募集中|cat=乙訓郡}} |location=京都府乙訓郡大山崎町円明寺 |type=帆立貝形古墳 |area=墳丘長51メートル |built= 4世紀末頃から5世紀初頭 |Burial Facility=竪穴式石室 |Interred Persons=不明 |burial goods=画文帯神獣鏡片・勾玉・巴形銅器 |Historic Site Designation=国の[[史跡]]「鳥居前古墳」
（「乙訓古墳群」に包含）{{Cite web|和書|author=大山崎町生涯学習課文化芸術係|url=https://www.city.kawasaki.jp/880/page/0000061976.html|title=鳥居前古墳の概要リーフレットはこちらからご覧になれます。|work=大山崎町|date=2019-06-21|accessdate=2022-02-11}} |位置={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E|region:JP-26|display=inline,title}} |地図2={{location map|Japan Kyoto|coordinates=34|coordinates=54|coordinates=42.5|lon_deg=135|lon_min=40|lon_sec=39.2|map_dot_label=鳥居前古墳|mark=帆立貝形古墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|border=none|caption=京都府内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E}}}} |Special Notes= }} {{nihongo|'''Torii-mae Kofun'''|[[:ja:鳥居前古墳|鳥居前古墳]]}} is a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}} (帆立貝形古墳) located in {{ill|Ōyamazaki Town|ja|大山崎町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamazaki Town|qq=}}, Otokuni District, Kyoto Prefecture. It is Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Otokuni Kofun Group|ja|乙訓古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otokuni Kofun Group|qq=}}. The mound was discovered in a 1967 survey and has since undergone three archaeological investigations by Kyoto Prefecture and Osaka University. == Overview == Toriimae Kofun is situated on the northern slopes of Mount Tennozan, known for the famous Battle of Yamazaki, at an elevation of 97 meters. The Kofun was identified during a distribution survey conducted by the Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education in 1967. Excavations of the rear circular section and part of the mound were conducted in 1969. Initially thought to be a [[Zenpokoenfun|keyhole-shaped tumulus]] (前方後円墳), subsequent investigations revised the Historic Site to a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. === burial and burial goods === The rear circular section contains a single {{ill|Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (竪穴式石室), oriented diagonally to the main axis of the mound. Measurements are as follows: * burial chamber: 9.0 × 4.4 meters * Stone chamber: Length 6.5 meters, width 1.2 meters (west end), 0.77 meters (east end) The chamber's upper stones and ceiling stones were already missing. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including {{ill|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|ja|天皇の杜古墳|1=Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|qq=}}, {{ill|Egayama Kofun|ja|恵解山古墳|1=Igenoyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Egayama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Igenoyama Kofun|qq=}}, and {{ill|Terado Otsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Otsuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}}.2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Ōyamazaki Town History]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Toriimae Kofun]] [[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[en:Toriimae Kofun]]

Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including {{ill|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|ja|天皇の杜古墳|1=Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-no-Mori Kofun|qq=}}, {{ill|Egayama Kofun|ja|恵解山古墳|1=Igenoyama Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Egayama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Igenoyama Kofun|qq=}}, and {{ill|Terado Otsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Otsuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}}.2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[en:Toriimae Kofun]]

revision.comment: Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鳥居前古墳 |所属=乙訓古墳群 |image={{画像募集中|cat=乙訓郡}} |location=京都府乙訓郡大山崎町円明寺 |type=帆立貝形古墳 |area=墳丘長51メートル |built= 4世紀末頃から5世紀初頭 |Burial Facility=竪穴式石室 |Interred Persons=不明 |burial goods=画文帯神獣鏡片・勾玉・巴形銅器 |Historic Site Designation=国の[[史跡]]「鳥居前古墳」
（「乙訓古墳群」に包含）{{Cite web|和書|author=大山崎町生涯学習課文化芸術係|url=https://www.city.kawasaki.jp/880/page/0000061976.html|title=鳥居前古墳の概要リーフレットはこちらからご覧になれます。|work=大山崎町|date=2019-06-21|accessdate=2022-02-11}} |位置={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E|region:JP-26|display=inline,title}} |地図2={{location map|Japan Kyoto|coordinates=34|coordinates=54|coordinates=42.5|lon_deg=135|lon_min=40|lon_sec=39.2|map_dot_label=鳥居前古墳|mark=帆立貝形古墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|border=none|caption=京都府内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E}}}} |Special Notes= }} {{nihongo|'''Torii-mae Kofun'''|[[:ja:鳥居前古墳|鳥居前古墳]]}} is a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}} (帆立貝形古墳) located in [[:en:Ōyamazaki, Kyoto|Ōyamazaki Town]], Otokuni District, Kyoto Prefecture. It is Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Otokuni Kofun Group|ja|乙訓古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otokuni Kofun Group|qq=}}. The mound was discovered in a 1967 survey and has since undergone three archaeological investigations by Kyoto Prefecture and Osaka University. == Overview == Toriimae Kofun is situated on the northern slopes of Mount Tennozan, known for the famous Battle of Yamazaki, at an elevation of 97 meters. The Kofun was identified during a distribution survey conducted by the Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education in 1967. Excavations of the rear circular section and part of the mound were conducted in 1969. Initially thought to be a [[Zenpokoenfun|keyhole-shaped tumulus]] (前方後円墳), subsequent investigations revised the Historic Site to a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. === burial and burial goods === The rear circular section contains a single {{ill|Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (竪穴式石室), oriented diagonally to the main axis of the mound. Measurements are as follows: * burial chamber: 9.0 × 4.4 meters * Stone chamber: Length 6.5 meters, width 1.2 meters (west end), 0.77 meters (east end) The chamber's upper stones and ceiling stones were already missing. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[en:Toriimae Kofun]]

A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[en:Toriimae Kofun]] [[Category:乙訓古墳群]] [[Category:乙訓郡の画像提供依頼]]

So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鳥居前古墳 |所属=乙訓古墳群 |image={{画像募集中|cat=乙訓郡}} |location=京都府乙訓郡大山崎町円明寺 |type=帆立貝形古墳 |area=墳丘長51メートル |built= 4世紀末頃から5世紀初頭 |Burial Facility=竪穴式石室 |Interred Persons=不明 |burial goods=画文帯神獣鏡片・勾玉・巴形銅器 |Historic Site Designation=国の[[史跡]]「鳥居前古墳」
（「乙訓古墳群」に包含）{{Cite web|和書|author=大山崎町生涯学習課文化芸術係|url=https://www.city.kawasaki.jp/880/page/0000061976.html|title=鳥居前古墳の概要リーフレットはこちらからご覧になれます。|work=大山崎町|date=2019-06-21|accessdate=2022-02-11}} |位置={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E|region:JP-26|display=inline,title}} |地図2={{location map|Japan Kyoto|coordinates=34|coordinates=54|coordinates=42.5|lon_deg=135|lon_min=40|lon_sec=39.2|map_dot_label=鳥居前古墳|mark=帆立貝形古墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|border=none|caption=京都府内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E}}}} |Special Notes= }} {{nihongo|'''Torii-mae Kofun'''|[[:ja:鳥居前古墳|鳥居前古墳]]}} is a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}} (帆立貝形古墳) located in [[:en:Ōyamazaki, Kyoto|Ōyamazaki Town]], Otokuni District, Kyoto Prefecture. It is Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Otokuni Kofun Group|ja|乙訓古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otokuni Kofun Group|qq=}}. The mound was discovered in a 1967 survey and has since undergone three archaeological investigations by Kyoto Prefecture and Osaka University. == Overview == Toriimae Kofun is situated on the northern slopes of Mount Tennozan, known for the famous Battle of Yamazaki, at an elevation of 97 meters. The Kofun was identified during a distribution survey conducted by the Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education in 1967. Excavations of the rear circular section and part of the mound were conducted in 1969. Initially thought to be a [[Zenpokoenfun|keyhole-shaped tumulus]] (前方後円墳), subsequent investigations revised the Historic Site to a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. === burial and burial goods === The rear circular section contains a single {{ill|Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (竪穴式石室), oriented diagonally to the main axis of the mound. Measurements are as follows: * burial chamber: 9.0 × 4.4 meters * Stone chamber: Length 6.5 meters, width 1.2 meters (west end), 0.77 meters (east end) The chamber's upper stones and ceiling stones were already missing. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[en:Toriimae Kofun]] [[Category:乙訓古墳群]] [[Category:乙訓郡の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:京都府にある国指定の史跡]]

The Kofun was identified during a distribution survey conducted by the Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education in 1967. Excavations of the rear circular section and part of the mound were conducted in 1969. Initially thought to be a [[Zenpokoenfun|keyhole-shaped tumulus]] (前方後円墳), subsequent investigations revised the Historic Site to a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. === burial and burial goods === The rear circular section contains a single {{ill|Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (竪穴式石室), oriented diagonally to the main axis of the mound. Measurements are as follows: * burial chamber: 9.0 × 4.4 meters * Stone chamber: Length 6.5 meters, width 1.2 meters (west end), 0.77 meters (east end) The chamber's upper stones and ceiling stones were already missing. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[en:Toriimae Kofun]] [[Category:乙訓古墳群]] [[Category:乙訓郡の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:京都府にある国指定の史跡]] [[Category:京都府の古墳]] [[Category:大山崎町の歴史]]

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鳥居前古墳 |所属=乙訓古墳群 |image={{画像募集中|cat=乙訓郡}} |location=京都府乙訓郡大山崎町円明寺 |type=帆立貝形古墳 |area=墳丘長51メートル |built= 4世紀末頃から5世紀初頭 |Burial Facility=竪穴式石室 |Interred Persons=不明 |burial goods=画文帯神獣鏡片・勾玉・巴形銅器 |Historic Site Designation=国の[[史跡]]「鳥居前古墳」
（「乙訓古墳群」に包含）{{Cite web|和書|author=大山崎町生涯学習課文化芸術係|url=https://www.city.kawasaki.jp/880/page/0000061976.html|title=鳥居前古墳の概要リーフレットはこちらからご覧になれます。|work=大山崎町|date=2019-06-21|accessdate=2022-02-11}} |位置={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E|region:JP-26|display=inline,title}} |地図2={{location map|Japan Kyoto|coordinates=34|coordinates=54|coordinates=42.5|lon_deg=135|lon_min=40|lon_sec=39.2|map_dot_label=鳥居前古墳|mark=帆立貝形古墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|border=none|caption=京都府内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E}}}} |Special Notes= }} {{nihongo|'''Torii-mae Kofun'''|[[:ja:鳥居前古墳|鳥居前古墳]]}} is a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}} (帆立貝形古墳) located in [[:en:Ōyamazaki, Kyoto|Ōyamazaki Town]], Otokuni District, Kyoto Prefecture. The mound was discovered in a 1967 survey and has since undergone three archaeological investigations by Kyoto Prefecture and Osaka University. == Overview == Toriimae Kofun is situated on the northern slopes of Mount Tennozan, known for the famous Battle of Yamazaki, at an elevation of 97 meters. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. （「乙訓古墳群」に包含）{{Cite web|和書|author=大山崎町生涯学習課文化芸術係|url=https://www.city.kawasaki.jp/880/page/0000061976.html|title=鳥居前古墳の概要リーフレットはこちらからご覧になれます。|work=大山崎町|date=2019-06-21|accessdate=2022-02-11}} |位置={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E|region:JP-26|display=inline,title}} |地図2={{location map|Japan Kyoto|coordinates=34|coordinates=54|coordinates=42.5|lon_deg=135|lon_min=40|lon_sec=39.2|map_dot_label=鳥居前古墳|mark=帆立貝形古墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|border=none|caption=京都府内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E}}}} |Special Notes= }} {{nihongo|'''Torii-mae Kofun'''|[[:ja:鳥居前古墳|鳥居前古墳]]}} is a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}} (帆立貝形古墳) located in [[:en:Ōyamazaki, Kyoto|Ōyamazaki Town]], Otokuni District, Kyoto Prefecture. It is Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Otokuni Kofun Group|ja|乙訓古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otokuni Kofun Group|qq=}}. The mound was discovered in a 1967 survey and has since undergone three archaeological investigations by Kyoto Prefecture and Osaka University. == Overview == Toriimae Kofun is situated on the northern slopes of Mount Tennozan, known for the famous Battle of Yamazaki, at an elevation of 97 meters. The Kofun was identified during a distribution survey conducted by the Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education in 1967. Excavations of the rear circular section and part of the mound were conducted in 1969. Initially thought to be a [[Zenpokoenfun|keyhole-shaped tumulus]] (前方後円墳), subsequent investigations revised the Historic Site to a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. === burial and burial goods === The rear circular section contains a single {{ill|Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (竪穴式石室), oriented diagonally to the main axis of the mound. Measurements are as follows: * burial chamber: 9.0 × 4.4 meters * Stone chamber: Length 6.5 meters, width 1.2 meters (west end), 0.77 meters (east end) The chamber's upper stones and ceiling stones were already missing. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Kofun in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[Category:乙訓古墳群]] [[Category:乙訓郡の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:National historic sites in Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:大山崎町の歴史]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Kofun in Kyoto Prefecture
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鳥居前古墳 |所属=乙訓古墳群 |image={{画像募集中|cat=乙訓郡}} |location=京都府乙訓郡大山崎町円明寺 |type=帆立貝形古墳 |area=墳丘長51メートル |built= 4世紀末頃から5世紀初頭 |Burial Facility=竪穴式石室 |Interred Persons=不明 |burial goods=画文帯神獣鏡片・勾玉・巴形銅器 |Historic Site Designation=国の[[史跡]]「鳥居前古墳」
（「乙訓古墳群」に包含）{{Cite web|和書|author=大山崎町生涯学習課文化芸術係|url=https://www.city.kawasaki.jp/880/page/0000061976.html|title=鳥居前古墳の概要リーフレットはこちらからご覧になれます。|work=大山崎町|date=2019-06-21|accessdate=2022-02-11}} |位置={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E|region:JP-26|display=inline,title}} |地図2={{location map|Japan Kyoto|coordinates=34|coordinates=54|coordinates=42.5|lon_deg=135|lon_min=40|lon_sec=39.2|map_dot_label=鳥居前古墳|mark=帆立貝形古墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|border=none|caption=京都府内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E}}}} |Special Notes= }} {{nihongo|'''Torii-mae Kofun'''|[[:ja:鳥居前古墳|鳥居前古墳]]}} is a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (帆立貝形古墳) located in [[:en:Ōyamazaki, Kyoto|Ōyamazaki Town]], Otokuni District, Kyoto Prefecture. It is Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Otokuni Kofun Group|ja|乙訓古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otokuni Kofun Group|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The mound was discovered in a 1967 survey and has since undergone three archaeological investigations by Kyoto Prefecture and Osaka University. == Overview == Toriimae Kofun is situated on the northern slopes of Mount Tennozan, known for the famous Battle of Yamazaki, at an elevation of 97 meters. The Kofun was identified during a distribution survey conducted by the Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education in 1967. Excavations of the rear circular section and part of the mound were conducted in 1969. Initially thought to be a [[Zenpokoenfun|keyhole-shaped tumulus]] (前方後円墳), subsequent investigations revised the Historic Site to a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. === burial and burial goods === The rear circular section contains a single {{ill|Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (竪穴式石室), oriented diagonally to the main axis of the mound. Measurements are as follows: * burial chamber: 9.0 × 4.4 meters * Stone chamber: Length 6.5 meters, width 1.2 meters (west end), 0.77 meters (east end) The chamber's upper stones and ceiling stones were already missing. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:kofun stubs]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[Category:乙訓古墳群]] [[Category:乙訓郡の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:National historic sites in Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:大山崎町の歴史]]

Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[Category:乙訓古墳群]] [[Category:乙訓郡の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:National historic sites in Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:大山崎町の歴史]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鳥居前古墳 |所属=乙訓古墳群 |image={{画像募集中|cat=乙訓郡}} |location=京都府乙訓郡大山崎町円明寺 |type=帆立貝形古墳 |area=墳丘長51メートル |built= 4世紀末頃から5世紀初頭 |Burial Facility=竪穴式石室 |Interred Persons=不明 |burial goods=画文帯神獣鏡片・勾玉・巴形銅器 |Historic Site Designation=国の[[史跡]]「鳥居前古墳」
（「乙訓古墳群」に包含）{{Cite web|和書|author=大山崎町生涯学習課文化芸術係|url=https://www.city.kawasaki.jp/880/page/0000061976.html|title=鳥居前古墳の概要リーフレットはこちらからご覧になれます。|work=大山崎町|date=2019-06-21|accessdate=2022-02-11}} |位置={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E|region:JP-26|display=inline,title}} |地図2={{location map|Japan Kyoto|coordinates=34|coordinates=54|coordinates=42.5|lon_deg=135|lon_min=40|lon_sec=39.2|map_dot_label=鳥居前古墳|mark=帆立貝形古墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|border=none|caption=京都府内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E}}}} |Special Notes= }} {{nihongo|'''Torii-mae Kofun'''|[[:ja:鳥居前古墳|鳥居前古墳]]}} is a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (帆立貝形古墳) located in [[:en:Ōyamazaki, Kyoto|Ōyamazaki Town]], Otokuni District, Kyoto Prefecture. It is Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Otokuni Kofun Group|ja|乙訓古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otokuni Kofun Group|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The mound was discovered in a 1967 survey and has since undergone three archaeological investigations by Kyoto Prefecture and Osaka University. == Overview == Toriimae Kofun is situated on the northern slopes of Mount Tennozan, known for the famous Battle of Yamazaki, at an elevation of 97 meters. The Kofun was identified during a distribution survey conducted by the Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education in 1967. Excavations of the rear circular section and part of the mound were conducted in 1969. Initially thought to be a [[Zenpokoenfun|keyhole-shaped tumulus]] (前方後円墳), subsequent investigations revised the Historic Site to a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. === burial and burial goods === The rear circular section contains a single {{ill|Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (竪穴式石室), oriented diagonally to the main axis of the mound. Measurements are as follows: * burial chamber: 9.0 × 4.4 meters * Stone chamber: Length 6.5 meters, width 1.2 meters (west end), 0.77 meters (east end) The chamber's upper stones and ceiling stones were already missing. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Otokuni Kofun Group]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Kyoto]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[Category:乙訓古墳群]] [[Category:乙訓郡の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:National historic sites in Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:大山崎町の歴史]]

A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[Category:乙訓古墳群]] [[Category:乙訓郡の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:National historic sites in Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:大山崎町の歴史]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{日本の古墳 |名称=鳥居前古墳 |所属=乙訓古墳群 |image={{画像募集中|cat=乙訓郡}} |location=京都府乙訓郡大山崎町円明寺 |type=帆立貝形古墳 |area=墳丘長51メートル |built= 4世紀末頃から5世紀初頭 |Burial Facility=竪穴式石室 |Interred Persons=不明 |burial goods=画文帯神獣鏡片・勾玉・巴形銅器 |Historic Site Designation=国の[[史跡]]「鳥居前古墳」
（「乙訓古墳群」に包含）{{Cite web|和書|author=大山崎町生涯学習課文化芸術係|url=https://www.city.kawasaki.jp/880/page/0000061976.html|title=鳥居前古墳の概要リーフレットはこちらからご覧になれます。|work=大山崎町|date=2019-06-21|accessdate=2022-02-11}} |位置={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E|region:JP-26|display=inline,title}} |地図2={{location map|Japan Kyoto|coordinates=34|coordinates=54|coordinates=42.5|lon_deg=135|lon_min=40|lon_sec=39.2|map_dot_label=鳥居前古墳|mark=帆立貝形古墳-北北東.svg|marksize=28|border=none|caption=京都府内の位置|position=bottom|width=200|float=center}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|54|42.5|N|135|40|39.2|E}}}} |Special Notes= }} {{nihongo|'''Torii-mae Kofun'''|[[:ja:鳥居前古墳|鳥居前古墳]]}} is a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (帆立貝形古墳) located in [[:en:Ōyamazaki, Kyoto|Ōyamazaki Town]], Otokuni District, Kyoto Prefecture. It is Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Otokuni Kofun Group|ja|乙訓古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otokuni Kofun Group|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. The mound was discovered in a 1967 survey and has since undergone three archaeological investigations by Kyoto Prefecture and Osaka University. == Overview == Toriimae Kofun is situated on the northern slopes of Mount Tennozan, known for the famous Battle of Yamazaki, at an elevation of 97 meters. The Kofun was identified during a distribution survey conducted by the Kyoto Prefectural Board of Education in 1967. Excavations of the rear circular section and part of the mound were conducted in 1969. Initially thought to be a [[Zenpokoenfun|keyhole-shaped tumulus]] (前方後円墳), subsequent investigations revised the Historic Site to a {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. === burial and burial goods === The rear circular section contains a single {{ill|Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} (竪穴式石室), oriented diagonally to the main axis of the mound. Measurements are as follows: * burial chamber: 9.0 × 4.4 meters * Stone chamber: Length 6.5 meters, width 1.2 meters (west end), 0.77 meters (east end) The chamber's upper stones and ceiling stones were already missing. A clay bed within the chamber likely housed a split-bamboo-shaped wooden coffin (割竹形木棺) of 5.3 meters in length. The coffin bed contained: * 2 [[magatama]] * 23 {{ill|Kudatama|ja|管玉|lt=cylindrical beads|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kudatama|qq=}} (管玉) * 8 iron swords * 21 daggers * 9 short swords * 2 comma-shaped copper objects (巴形銅器) Additional grave goods, including swords, arrows, armor fragments, and fragments of a deity-beast mirror (画文帯神獣鏡), were found in disturbed soil within the chamber. === Mound burial === The mound, initially covered in bamboo, had been heavily modified by later activities. Excavations revealed that the mound, originally believed to be keyhole-shaped, is {{ill|Scallop Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|lt=scallop-shaped|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It consists of three tiers and measures: * Total length: 51 meters * Diameter of the rear section: 38.4 meters * Length of the frontal section: 12.5 meters * Width of the frontal section: Approximately 31 meters * Height of the rear section: Over 6.5 meters The mound was covered with fukiishi (葺石), sourced locally within 500 meters. The tiers were encircled with cylindrical haniwa, along with jar- and lid-shaped haniwa. Seven lid-shaped haniwa were uncovered across three excavations. === built === Based on these findings, archaeologist {{ill|Hiroshi Tsude|ja|都出比呂志|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiroshi Tsude|qq=}} estimates the mound's construction to around the late 4th century to early 5th century. == Historic Site == === National Historic Site === * Toriimae Kofun (part of the Otokuni Kofun Group) * Designated on March 1, 2016, along with other mounds in the Otokuni Kofun Group, including [[:en:Tennō-no-Mori Kofun|Tenno-no-Mori Kofun]], [[:en:Igenoyama Kofun|Igenoyama Kofun]], and [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]].2016 Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology Notification No. 31 == References == * == External Links == * [http://www.isekiwalker.com/iseki/108736/ Toriimae Kofun] - Iseki Walker {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鳥居前古墳|version=104325032|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]][[sn:Toriimae Kofun]]}} [[sn:Toriimae Kofun]] [[ja:鳥居前古墳]] [[ja:大山崎町]] [[ja:乙訓古墳群]] [[ja:都出比呂志]] [[ja:天皇の杜古墳]] [[ja:恵解山古墳]] [[ja:寺戸大塚古墳]] [[sn:oriimae Kofun]] [[ja:%E9%B3%A5%E5%B1%85%E5%89%8D%E5%8F%A4%E5%A2%B3]] [[Category:乙訓古墳群]] [[Category:乙訓郡の画像提供依頼]] [[Category:National historic sites in Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Kyoto prefecture]] [[Category:大山崎町の歴史]]
